title: lupinus bicolor var. microphyllus
intro: Lupinus bicolor var. microphyllus is a variety of the lupine plant, specifically a low-growing, short-stemmed, and compact form of the lupine, native to the Pacific coastal region of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high concentration of alkaloids. The health benefits of Lupinus bicolor var. microphyllus include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
